subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Local Art Cultural Map Finale
objective: Bumuo ng evidence-based cultural map gamit ang original at non-sacred designs.
introduction: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Local Art Cultural Map Finale”.
A key word used in the lesson “Local Art Cultural Map Finale”.
A key word used in the lesson “Local Art Cultural Map Finale”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

options: Gumamit ng original motif at malinaw na source note.

feedback.correct: Correct: Gumamit ng original motif at malinaw na source note.
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. Kopyahin ang sagradong disenyo. and Sabihing opisyal ang prototype. do not fit.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Local Art Cultural Map Finale”?

options.text: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.
The correct response is “original motif” because it follows the lesson explanation: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Kopyahin sacred pattern” because it follows the lesson explanation: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

options.text: Gumamit ng original motif at malinaw na source note.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Gumamit ng original motif at malinaw na source note.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “fictional place label” because it follows the lesson explanation: Huwag kopyahin ang sagrado, Indigenous, official, o gawa ng living artist nang walang pahintulot at konsultasyon.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Local Art Cultural Map Finale; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Local Art Cultural Map Finale.
